# Tasks.MissingCapabilityCode field

The §22 error code a server uses when a Tasks method is invoked but the extension is unavailable (not advertised, or the method cannot be serviced): `-32003` MissingRequiredClientCapability (§25.2, R-25.2-f). The TS server returns this — NOT `-32601` — for an un-negotiated Tasks method.

```csharp
public const int MissingCapabilityCode;
```
